name: loaders
description: A collection of specialized skeleton loader components for common UI patterns including media items, table rows, and text blocks.
usage_guidelines: Use MediaSkeleton for user profiles, media items, or cards with avatars.
Use TableRowSkeleton for loading states in tables.
Use TextBlockSkeleton for article content, descriptions, or text-heavy areas.
Match skeleton structure to actual content for smooth transitions.
Customize dimensions and appearance with props.

MediaSkeleton.description: Skeleton for media items with optional avatar, title, and text lines.

props.showAvatar: boolean (default: true) - Shows circular avatar skeleton

TableRowSkeleton.description: Skeleton for table rows with configurable columns and avatar positions.

TextBlockSkeleton.description: Skeleton for text content blocks with optional title and multiple lines.

styling_info.visual_description: Animated pulse skeletons matching common UI patterns. Gray backgrounds with smooth animations. Responsive widths and configurable dimensions.

Do: Match skeleton to actual content structure
Use appropriate loader for content type
Configure dimensions to match real content
Dont: Don't mismatch skeleton and content layouts
Don't show skeletons for very fast loads
Don't forget to replace with actual content
Don't use too many skeleton rows
